title: Craftable Scrolls - Addon for Elementals
description: Adds new items to craft scrolls for the mod Elementals by Saperate
body:
Adds 5 new core items in addition to Elementals mod by Saperate:

Heart of Air - 7 Feathers 1 Stick 1 Gunpowder

Water Shard - 4 Kelp 1 Conduit                                                                                                                                           

Dirt Core - 4 Charcoal 3 Coal 1 Emerald 1 Diamond                                         

Benders Embers - 3 Raw Gold 1 Blaze Rod 1 Blaze Powder 4 Nether Bricks

Dried Paper - 3 Leather 1 Paper

All these are used to craft the different scrolls, the recipe is the same for every scroll except the core item in the middle. 3 Dried paper on the edge collumns 1Nether Star on top 1Diamond at the bottom and the middle is the item of which scroll you want to craft
